name: The Rising Bog
toastText: The Rising Bog — the deep floods, foul water pools below...
logText: Bog-water seeps up from the deep. Floor laid in the lowest rows becomes fen.

name: Féth Fíada
toastText: Féth Fíada — the fairy mist closes in around you...
logText: The druid-mist of the Sídhe swallows the dark. You cannot see as far.

name: Cluricaun's Hoard
toastText: Cluricaun's Hoard — gold glints in every seam of the stone!
logText: A cluricaun's hoard laces this floor. Line clears pay double gold.

name: The Unquiet Cairn
toastText: The Unquiet Cairn — the buried dead stir beneath the stone...
logText: This cairn's dead do not rest. More monsters ride the falling stone, and the bones walk.

name: Fomorian Weight
toastText: Fomorian Weight — the air itself presses down. Stone falls faster!
logText: A Fomorian curse hangs heavy here. Blocks fall 20% faster.

name: Wild Rift-Surge
toastText: Wild Rift-Surge — the Otherworld bleeds through the stone...
logText: The rift runs wild. Far more falling stone comes cursed — or blessed.
